revision.comment: /* top */Switched to more comprehensive documentation ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/SdkbBot 4|task 4]])
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Ministries of Japan | title = [[Government of Japan|Japanese government]] [[Ministries of Japan|ministries]] and agencies | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist
| list1 = * [[Cabinet of Japan|Cabinet]] | list2 = * [[Cabinet Secretariat (Japan)|Cabinet Secretariat]] * [[Cabinet Legislation Bureau]] * [[National Security Council (Japan)|National Security Council]] * [[National Personnel Authority]] | list3 = * [[Cabinet Office (Japan)|Cabinet Office]] ** [[Imperial Household Agency]] ** [[Fair Trade Commission (Japan)|Fair Trade Commission]] ** [[National Public Safety Commission (Japan)|National Public Safety Commission]] and [[National Police Agency (Japan)|National Police Agency]] ** [[Personal Information Protection Commission (Japan)|Personal Information Protection Commission]] ** [[Financial Services Agency]] ** [[Consumer Affairs Agency]] ** [[Japan Casino Regulatory Commission|Casino Regulatory Commission]] ** {{ill|Children and Families Agency|ja|こども家庭庁}} * [[Digital Agency]] * [[Reconstruction Agency]] | list4 = * [[Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications|Internal Affairs and Communications]] ([[Minister for Internal Affairs and Communications|List]]) * [[Ministry of Justice (Japan)|Justice]] ([[Minister of Justice (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|Foreign Affairs]] ([[Minister for Foreign Affairs (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Finance (Japan)|Finance]] ([[Minister of Finance (Japan)|List]])
* [[Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology|Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology]] ([[Minister of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology|List]]) * [[Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|Health, Labour, and Welfare]] ([[Minister of Health, Labour, and Welfare|List]])
* [[Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries (Japan)|Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries]] ([[Minister of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry|Economy, Trade and Industry]] ([[Minister of Economy, Trade and Industry|List]])
* [[Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism|Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism]] ([[Minister of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism|List]]) * [[Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|Environment]] ([[Minister of the Environment (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Defense (Japan)|Defense]] ([[Minister of Defense (Japan)|List]]) | below = * [[Board of Audit]] (constitutionally independent) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan politics and government templates]] [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

| list1 = * [[:en:Cabinet of Japan|Cabinet]] | list2 = * [[:en:Cabinet Secretariat (Japan)|Cabinet Secretariat]] * [[:en:Cabinet Legislation Bureau|Cabinet Legislation Bureau]] * [[National Security Council (Japan)|National Security Council]] * [[National Personnel Authority]] | list3 = * [[:en:Cabinet Office (Japan)|Cabinet Office]] ** [[Imperial Household Agency]] ** [[:en:Fair Trade Commission (Japan)|Fair Trade Commission]] ** [[National Public Safety Commission (Japan)|National Public Safety Commission]] and [[National Police Agency (Japan)|National Police Agency]] ** [[Personal Information Protection Commission (Japan)|Personal Information Protection Commission]] ** [[:en:Financial Services Agency|Financial Services Agency]] ** [[Consumer Affairs Agency]] ** [[Japan Casino Regulatory Commission|Casino Regulatory Commission]] ** {{ill|Children and Families Agency|ja|こども家庭庁|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Children and Families Agency|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Children and Families Agency|qq=}} * [[Digital Agency]] * [[Reconstruction Agency]] | list4 = * [[Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications|Internal Affairs and Communications]] ([[Minister for Internal Affairs and Communications|List]]) * [[Ministry of Justice (Japan)|Justice]] ([[Minister of Justice (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|Foreign Affairs]] ([[Minister for Foreign Affairs (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Finance (Japan)|Finance]] ([[Minister of Finance (Japan)|List]])
* [[Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology|Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology]] ([[Minister of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology|List]]) * [[Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|Health, Labour, and Welfare]] ([[Minister of Health, Labour, and Welfare|List]])
* [[Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries (Japan)|Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries]] ([[Minister of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry|Economy, Trade and Industry]] ([[Minister of Economy, Trade and Industry|List]])
* [[Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism|Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism]] ([[Minister of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism|List]]) * [[Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|Environment]] ([[Minister of the Environment (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Defense (Japan)|Defense]] ([[Minister of Defense (Japan)|List]]) | below = * [[Board of Audit]] (constitutionally independent) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan politics and government templates]] [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

| list1 = * [[:en:Cabinet of Japan|Cabinet]] | list2 = * [[:en:Cabinet Secretariat (Japan)|Cabinet Secretariat]] * [[:en:Cabinet Legislation Bureau|Cabinet Legislation Bureau]] * [[National Security Council (Japan)|National Security Council]] * [[National Personnel Authority]] | list3 = * [[:en:Cabinet Office (Japan)|Cabinet Office]] ** [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] ** [[:en:Fair Trade Commission (Japan)|Fair Trade Commission]] ** [[National Public Safety Commission (Japan)|National Public Safety Commission]] and [[National Police Agency (Japan)|National Police Agency]] ** [[Personal Information Protection Commission (Japan)|Personal Information Protection Commission]] ** [[:en:Financial Services Agency|Financial Services Agency]] ** [[:en:Consumer Affairs Agency|Consumer Affairs Agency]] ** [[:en:Japan Casino Regulatory Commission|Casino Regulatory Commission]] ** {{ill|Children and Families Agency|ja|こども家庭庁|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Children and Families Agency|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Children and Families Agency|qq=}} * [[:en:Digital Agency|Digital Agency]] * [[Reconstruction Agency]] | list4 = * [[Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications|Internal Affairs and Communications]] ([[:en:Minister for Internal Affairs and Communications|List]]) * [[Ministry of Justice (Japan)|Justice]] ([[Minister of Justice (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|Foreign Affairs]] ([[:en:Minister for Foreign Affairs (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Finance (Japan)|Finance]] ([[Minister of Finance (Japan)|List]])
* [[Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology|Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology]] ([[Minister of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology|List]]) * [[Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|Health, Labour, and Welfare]] ([[Minister of Health, Labour, and Welfare|List]])
* [[Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries (Japan)|Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries]] ([[:en:Minister of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry|Economy, Trade and Industry]] ([[:en:Minister of Economy, Trade and Industry|List]])
* [[Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism|Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism]] ([[Minister of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism|List]]) * [[Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|Environment]] ([[Minister of the Environment (Japan)|List]]) * [[Ministry of Defense (Japan)|Defense]] ([[:en:Minister of Defense (Japan)|List]]) | below = * [[:en:Board of Audit|Board of Audit]] (constitutionally independent) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan politics and government templates]] [[Category:Japan navigational boxes]] </noinclude>
